details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation. All rubric requirements met: (1) Stats(StatsArgs) variant and struct properly added to CacheCommand enum; (2) cache_stats function correctly iterates CacheBucket::iter(), uses DiskUsage for size computation, returns ExitStatus::Success; (3) --human flag with human_readable_bytes formatting implemented; (4) Output includes per-bucket lines and total line with proper alignment; (5) Module registered in commands/mod.rs with pub(crate) use; (6) Dispatch wiring in lib.rs matches Stats(args) and calls cache_stats; (7) Follows same patterns as cache_size command; (8) Preview feature (CacheStats) properly integrated in uv-preview with warning message; (9) Comprehensive tests covering empty cache, raw bytes, and human-readable output with proper filtering helpers. Code quality is high with proper error handling, formatting logic, and test organization.
